# Identity Module

Module ID: identity
Status: available
Class: platform
Purpose: Passwordless email-code login + server-side sessions, built on @microservices-sh/auth. Bridges an authenticated session to a short-lived scoped service token (Plan 26).
Entrypoint: src/index.ts

RPC exposed: requestLoginCode, verifyLoginCode, readSession, destroySession
Events emitted: identity.login_code_issued, identity.login_verified, identity.session_created, identity.session_destroyed
Hook points: beforeVerifyCode (filter, identity.extend), afterSessionCreated (observer, identity.observe)
Resources: D1 DB (accounts, login_codes, sessions)
Permissions: identity.login, identity.session, identity.admin, identity.extend, identity.observe
Requires: auth
Optional: email, audit-log

Flow: requestLoginCode issues a 6-digit code (10 min TTL), stores only a salted
SHA-256 hash, emails the plaintext to the user. verifyLoginCode timing-safe compares
the submitted code, upserts the account, and creates a 30-day rolling session.
readSession/destroySession manage the session lifecycle. mintSessionToken bridges a
session to a short-lived scoped service JWT via @microservices-sh/auth.

Security: login codes are never stored plaintext (salted SHA-256); comparison is
constant-time; tokens are signed by the auth module (EdDSA), never a local secret.

Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build
Test: pnpm test
